titleStmt.title: SII 6.938: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 938. (A.R. No. 302-A of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti sālasyagōtrābdhisaṁbhūtarajanīkaraḥ trilōcanasutaḥ śrīmā nerusēnāpatirmahān . 1 Umādēvīti vikhyātā mahiṣī tasya bhāminī . Āyu
raiśvaryyasaubhāgyavṛdhdhayē patyurātmanaḥ . 2 śākābdē tarkkarāmadyumaṇiparimitē puṣyaśuklē daśamyāṁ vārē jīvasya siṁhakṣitibhṛti nṛharēḥ sannidhau svasya bhartuḥ
gāḥ prādāt tatvasaṁkhyaḥ pratidinamadhikakṣīriṇīrddīpahētōrdhdharmmōyaṁ dharmmaśīlairguṇagaṇamahitairvaiṣṇavaiḥ pālanīyaḥ . 3 svasti śrī . śakavarṣaṁbulu
1236 gunēṁṭi śrīdēvādidēva śrīpuruṣōttamadēvasya pravarddhamāna vijayarājyasaṁvatsaraṁbulu 9 gu śrāhi makara śukla daśamiyu guru
vāramunāṁḍu sālasyagōtruṁḍaina trilōcanajīyyana koḍku śrīErumahāsēnāpatulu tamaku puṇyābhivṛdhdhigānu śrīnarasiṁhanāthuniki
pratidinamunnu tirumāla cātuṭaku Akhaṁḍānaṁdaśrīpādamulacē vilcu puṣpavāṭika gaṭṭu Allupasāticē vilcu gaṭluṁgā Ī reṁḍu tōṁṭa
la tirumāla peṭeḍi dāsarula pēḷlu 3 ṭiki jītamu ḍāsūramāḍalu 7 vīriki kūṭiki Oḍḍādi cōḍāvaramuna khaṁḍika kaṁkkaṇatuṇiya puṭi 1
mahāsēnāpatula bhāryya Umādēvināyakāṇi peṭina Akhaṁḍadīpa mokkaṁṭiki mōdālu 25 gollanāvibhōĪ vaśamu
vīri śiṣṭu śivadāsunāyaku peṭina dīpa 1 ṭi mōdālu 25 muppakōnā ḷanānnipeṭina tōṁṭa nibaṁdhāThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 6.938 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
